Timeline Component Demo

Interactive demonstration of the slide timeline interface with transcript synchronization

Performance TestingAccessibility TestingIntegration Testing
Demo Information
This demo showcases the interactive timeline with 3 slide events and 3 transcript segments. Test the synchronization between timeline and transcript, keyboard navigation, and responsive design.
3
Timeline Events
3
Transcript Segments
30s
Total Duration
Testing Instructions

Interaction Tests

  • • Click timeline events to see synchronization
  • • Click transcript segments to see selection
  • • Toggle sync on/off to test independence
  • • Try different layout orientations

Accessibility Tests

  • • Use Tab key to navigate components
  • • Test with screen reader if available
  • • Use arrow keys for timeline navigation
  • • Test Enter/Space key interactions
Interactive Timeline Interface
Full timeline with transcript synchronization, feedback display, and interactive controls
0:00/ 0:30
Sync
3 events3 segments
Use arrow keys to navigate events, Enter or Space to select, E to expand/collapse feedback, Escape to deselect.
